requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety Baseline — Togo Conformity and Installation Evidence
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851安全基线——多哥合格评定与安装证据
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851安全基線——多哥合格評定與安裝證據

summary.en: Togo has no confirmed public EVSE-specific safety regulation equivalent to a published national EV charger technical code as of 2026-06-14. For imported or installed EV supply equipment, IEC 61851-1 is the practical international safety baseline for conductive EV charging, covering control pilot behaviour, protective earthing, isolation monitoring, interlocks, overcurrent and over-temperature protection, and emergency stop provisions where applicable. IEC 61851-23 applies to DC EV charging stations. Electrical installations also need site-level acceptance by the owner, installer, utility, and relevant authorities. Outdoor equipment in Togo should be specified for high temperature, humidity, rain, dust, insects, corrosion, and unstable supply conditions; IP55 or higher for outdoor AC and IP54 or higher for DC cabinets is a prudent minimum unless a stricter project specification applies.
summary.zh: 截至2026年6月14日，未能确认多哥已公开发布相当于国家电动汽车充电桩技术规范的EVSE专门安全法规。对于进口或安装的电动汽车供电设备，IEC 61851-1是传导式电动汽车充电的实用国际安全基线，涵盖控制导引、保护接地、绝缘监测、互锁、过流及过温保护，以及适用时的急停措施。IEC 61851-23适用于直流电动汽车充电站。电气安装还需要业主、安装方、公用事业单位和相关主管机关的场址级验收。多哥户外设备应针对高温、湿度、降雨、粉尘、昆虫、腐蚀和不稳定供电条件进行规格设定；除非项目规格更严格，户外交流建议至少IP55，直流柜建议至少IP54。
summary.zht: 截至2026年6月14日，未能確認多哥已公開發布相當於國家電動汽車充電樁技術規範的EVSE專門安全法規。對於進口或安裝的電動汽車供電設備，IEC 61851-1是傳導式電動汽車充電的實用國際安全基線，涵蓋控制導引、保護接地、絕緣監測、互鎖、過流及過溫保護，以及適用時的急停措施。IEC 61851-23適用於直流電動汽車充電站。電氣安裝還需要業主、安裝方、公用事業單位和相關主管機關的場址級驗收。多哥戶外設備應針對高溫、濕度、降雨、粉塵、昆蟲、腐蝕和不穩定供電條件進行規格設定；除非項目規格更嚴格，戶外交流建議至少IP55，直流櫃建議至少IP54。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment
IEC 61851-24 — Digital communication between a DC EV charging station and an EV for control of DC charging
IEC 60529 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IP Code)
Togo national conformity and electrical-installation review; ARSE / CEET coordination for grid-connected installations

summary.en: China's comparable baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023, which corresponds structurally to IEC 61851-1 but includes China-specific connector, signaling, and communication requirements. GB/T 18487.1-2023 evidence is useful as a design reference, but it does not by itself prove IEC 61851 compliance for a Togo deployment, especially where donor/lender specifications, IEC-aligned tenders, or imported IEC-connector vehicles are involved.
summary.zh: 中国可比基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023，其结构上对应IEC 61851-1，但包含中国特有的接口、信号和通信要求。GB/T 18487.1-2023证据可作为设计参考，但其本身不能证明面向多哥部署的IEC 61851合规性，尤其是在涉及捐助方/贷款方规格、IEC对齐招标或进口IEC接口车辆时。
summary.zht: 中國可比基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023，其結構上對應IEC 61851-1，但包含中國特有的接口、信號和通訊要求。GB/T 18487.1-2023證據可作為設計參考，但其本身不能證明面向多哥部署的IEC 61851合規性，尤其是在涉及捐助方/貸款方規格、IEC對齊招標或進口IEC接口車輛時。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: Exporters should prepare an IEC 61851-1 clause matrix, accredited IEC safety test reports, IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC products, enclosure IP certificates, protective device ratings, earthing and RCD design evidence, thermal derating evidence for high ambient temperature, and installation instructions in French where the project reviewer requires Francophone documentation. A standalone GB/T 18487 report should be treated as a starting point and mapped clause-by-clause to the IEC evidence package.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备IEC 61851-1逐条矩阵、认可IEC安全测试报告、直流产品IEC 61851-23证据、外壳IP证书、保护器件额定值、接地和RCD设计证据、高环境温度热降额证据，以及在项目审查方要求法语文件时提供法语安装说明。单独的GB/T 18487报告应视为起点，并逐条映射到IEC证据包。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備IEC 61851-1逐條矩陣、認可IEC安全測試報告、直流產品IEC 61851-23證據、外殼IP證書、保護器件額定值、接地和RCD設計證據、高環境溫度熱降額證據，以及在項目審查方要求法語文件時提供法語安裝說明。單獨的GB/T 18487報告應視為起點，並逐條映射到IEC證據包。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where required by Togo conformity review, CEET or ARSE project review, site owner, tender, donor/lender specification, or electrical-installation approval; no standalone published Togo EVSE safety code confirmed from official public sources as of 2026-06-14
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and certification; it is not direct IEC 61851 evidence for Togo without additional mapping or testing

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat GB/T 18487.1-2023 as a design starting point only. For Togo-facing EVSE, prepare IEC 61851 evidence, local installation documentation, environmental derating data, and French documentation where requested by the reviewer, tender, or site owner.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应仅将GB/T 18487.1-2023作为设计起点。面向多哥的EVSE应准备IEC 61851证据、当地安装文件、环境降额数据，以及审查方、招标或场地方要求时的法语文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應僅將GB/T 18487.1-2023作為設計起點。面向多哥的EVSE應準備IEC 61851證據、當地安裝文件、環境降額數據，以及審查方、招標或場地方要求時的法語文件。
